MBSF with Medicare Part A, B, C, and D Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.9 
53 
SEX_IDENT_CD 
LABEL: 
Sex 
DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates the sex of the beneficiary. 
SHORT NAME: SEX 
LONG NAME: SEX_IDENT_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) 
VALUES: 
0 = Unknown 
1 = Male 
2 = Female 
COMMENT: 
—
